2082: export async function claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(
2083:   db: D1Database,
2084:   workspaceId: string,
2085:   deploymentId: string
2086: ): Promise<boolean> {
2087:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2088:   const result = await db
2089:     .prepare(
2090:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2091:        SET status = 'running',
2092:            started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?),
2093:            attempt_count = attempt_count + 1,
2094:            updated_at = ?
2095:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2096:     )
2097:     .bind(now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2098:     .run();
2099: 
2100:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
2101: }
2102: 
2103: export async function updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(
2104:   db: D1Database,
2105:   deploymentId: string,
2106:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus,
2107:   options?: {
2108:     workspaceId?: string;
2109:     result?: unknown;
2110:     toolchain?: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
2111:     dependencyCacheKey?: string | null;
2112:     dependencyCacheHit?: boolean;
2113:     remediations?: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];
2114:     errorCode?: string | null;
2115:     errorMessage?: string | null;
2116:     sourceSnapshotSha256?: string | null;
2117:     sourceBundleKey?: string | null;
2118:     deployedUrl?: string | null;
2119:     providerDeploymentId?: string | null;
2120:     cancelRequestedAt?: string | null;
2121:     startedAt?: string | null;
2122:     finishedAt?: string | null;
2123:   }
2124: ): Promise<void> {
2125:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
2126:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
2127:   let explicitFinishedAt: string | null | undefined;
2128: 
2129:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
2130:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
2131:     values.push(options.startedAt);
2132:   }
2133:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
2134:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
2135:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
2136:     explicitFinishedAt = options.finishedAt;
2137:   }
2138:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
2139:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
2140:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
2141:   }
2142:   if (options?.toolchain !== undefined) {
2143:     updates.push('toolchain_json = ?');
2144:     values.push(options.toolchain ? JSON.stringify(options.toolchain) : null);
2145:   }
2146:   if (options?.dependencyCacheKey !== undefined) {
2147:     updates.push('dependency_cache_key = ?');
2148:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheKey);
2149:   }
2150:   if (options?.dependencyCacheHit !== undefined) {
2151:     updates.push('dependency_cache_hit = ?');
2152:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheHit ? 1 : 0);
2153:   }
2154:   if (options?.remediations !== undefined) {
2155:     updates.push('remediations_json = ?');
2156:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.remediations));
2157:   }
2158:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
2159:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
2160:     values.push(options.errorCode);
2161:   }
2162:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2163:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
2164:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
2165:   }
2166:   if (options?.sourceSnapshotSha256 !== undefined) {
2167:     updates.push('source_snapshot_sha256 = ?');
2168:     values.push(options.sourceSnapshotSha256);
2169:   }
2170:   if (options?.sourceBundleKey !== undefined) {
2171:     updates.push('source_bundle_key = ?');
2172:     values.push(options.sourceBundleKey);
2173:   }
2174:   if (options?.deployedUrl !== undefined) {
2175:     updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
2176:     values.push(options.deployedUrl);
2177:   }
2178:   if (options?.providerDeploymentId !== undefined) {
2179:     updates.push('provider_deployment_id = ?');
2180:     values.push(options.providerDeploymentId);
2181:   }
2182:   if (options?.cancelRequestedAt !== undefined) {
2183:     updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
2184:     values.push(options.cancelRequestedAt);
2185:   }
2186: 
2187:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
2188:     const finishedAtForDuration =
2189:       explicitFinishedAt && typeof explicitFinishedAt === 'string' ? explicitFinishedAt : new Date().toISOString();
2190:     if (explicitFinishedAt === undefined) {
2191:       updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2192:       values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2193:     }
2194:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
2195:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2196:   }
2197: 
2198:   values.push(deploymentId);
2199:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
2200:   if (options?.workspaceId) {
2201:     whereClause += ' AND workspace_id = ?';
2202:     values.push(options.workspaceId);
2203:   }
2204: 
2205:   await db
2206:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_deployments SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
2207:     .bind(...values)
2208:     .run();
2209: }
2210: 
2211: export async function markWorkspaceDeploymentSucceededIfNotCancelled(
2212:   db: D1Database,
2213:   input: {
2214:     workspaceId: string;
2215:     deploymentId: string;
2216:     sourceSnapshotSha256: string;
2217:     sourceBundleKey: string;
2218:     deployedUrl: string;
2219:     providerDeploymentId: string;
2220:     result: unknown;
2221:     finishedAt: string;
2222:   }
2223: ): Promise<boolean> {
2224:   const updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
2225:   const result = await db
2226:     .prepare(
2227:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2228:        SET status = 'succeeded',
2229:            source_snapshot_sha256 = ?,
2230:            source_bundle_key = ?,
2231:            deployed_url = ?,
2232:            provider_deployment_id = ?,
2233:            result_json = ?,
2234:            error_code = NULL,
2235:            error_message = NULL,
2236:            finished_at = ?,
2237:            duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
2238:            updated_at = ?
2239:        WHERE id = ?
2240:          AND workspace_id = ?
2241:          AND status = 'running'
2242:          AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2243:     )
2244:     .bind(
2245:       input.sourceSnapshotSha256,
2246:       input.sourceBundleKey,
2247:       input.deployedUrl,
2248:       input.providerDeploymentId,
2249:       JSON.stringify(input.result),
2250:       input.finishedAt,
2251:       input.finishedAt,
2252:       updatedAt,
2253:       input.deploymentId,
2254:       input.workspaceId
2255:     )
2256:     .run();
2257: 
2258:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
2259: }
2260: 
2261: export async function requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(
2262:   db: D1Database,
2263:   workspaceId: string,
2264:   deploymentId: string
2265: ): Promise<{ deployment: WorkspaceDeploymentResponse | null; updated: boolean }> {
2266:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2267:   const queuedResult = await db
2268:     .prepare(
2269:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2270:        SET status = 'cancelled',
2271:            cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2272:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
2273:            error_code = NULL,
2274:            error_message = NULL,
2275:            updated_at = ?
2276:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
2277:     )
2278:     .bind(now, now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2279:     .run();
2280: 
2281:   const runningResult = await db
2282:     .prepare(
2283:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2284:        SET cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2285:            updated_at = ?
2286:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2287:     )
2288:     .bind(now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2289:     .run();
2290: 
2291:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2292: 
2293:   return {
2294:     deployment,
2295:     updated: (queuedResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0 || (runningResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0,
2296:   };
2297: }
2298: 
2299: export async function appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
2300:   db: D1Database,
2301:   input: {
2302:     workspaceId: string;
2303:     deploymentId: string;
2304:     eventType: string;
2305:     payload: unknown;
2306:   }
2307: ): Promise<number> {
2308:   const seqResult = await db
2309:     .prepare(
2310:       'UPDATE workspace_deployments SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq'
2311:     )
2312:     .bind(input.deploymentId, input.workspaceId)
2313:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
2314: 
2315:   if (!seqResult) {
2316:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for workspace deployment ${input.deploymentId}`);
2317:   }
2318: 
2319:   const seq = Number(seqResult.last_event_seq);

1221:   if (providerStatus.status === 'queued' || providerStatus.status === 'running') {
1222:     throw new PolicyError(
1223:       'provider_deploy_failed',
1224:       `Provider deployment did not reach terminal state within polling window (${maxPollAttempts} attempts)`
1225:     );
1226:   }
1227: 
1228:   if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1229:     throw new PolicyError(providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed', providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed');
1230:   }
1231: 
1232:   if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1233:     await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1234:     return;
1235:   }
1236: 
1237:   const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? createResult.deployedUrl;
1238:   if (!deployedUrl) {
1239:     throw new PolicyError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Provider deployment did not return a deployed URL');
1240:   }
1241:

1243:   const successResult = {
1244:     url: deployedUrl,
1245:     artifact: {
1246:       sourceBundleKey,

1248:       outputBundleSha256: outputBundle.sha256,
1249:       outputDir: publishOutputDir,
1250:     },

1253:       taskId,
1254:       operationId,
1255:       trigger: typeof provenance.trigger === 'string' ? provenance.trigger : 'manual',
1256:     },

1325: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
1326:   env: Env,
1327:   workspaceId: string,
1328:   options?: Partial<DeploymentValidationOptions & DeploymentAutoFixOptions & DeploymentPublishOptions>
1329: ): Promise<{
1330:   ok: boolean;
1331:   toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
1332:   checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }>;
1333:   remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];
1334: }> {
1335:   const checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }> = [];
1336:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
1337:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
1338:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
1339:     checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: false, details: 'Workspace is not ready' });
1340:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1341:   }
1342:   checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: true });
1343: 
1344:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
1345:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =
1346:     typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim() ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot : '.';
1347:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
1348:   try {
1349:     workspaceProjectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(workspaceProjectRootRaw);
1350:   } catch (error) {
1351:     checks.push({
1352:       code: 'project_root',
1353:       ok: false,
1354:       details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1355:     });
1356:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1357:   }
1358:   const autoFixBaseline = parseBoolean(options?.rehydrateBaseline, false);
1359:   const autoFixBootstrapToolchain = parseBoolean(options?.bootstrapToolchain, false);
1360:   const runBuildIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runBuildIfPresent, true);
1361:   const runTestsIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runTestsIfPresent, true);
1362:   const provider = options?.provider ?? getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(undefined, env);
1363:   const outputDir = parseString(options?.outputDir);
1364: 
1365:   if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
1366:     if (!outputDir) {
1367:       checks.push({
1368:         code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
1369:         ok: false,
1370:         details: 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider',
1371:       });
1372:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1373:     }
1374: 
1375:     const effectiveOutputDir =
1376:       workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? outputDir : normalizeProjectRoot(`${workspaceProjectRoot}/${outputDir}`);
1377:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_output_dir', ok: true, details: effectiveOutputDir });
1378:   }
1379: 
1380:   try {
1381:     await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
1382:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: true });
1383:   } catch (error) {
1384:     const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1385:     if (!autoFixBaseline) {
1386:       checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details });
1387:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1388:     }
1389: 
1390:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
1391:     if (!rehydrated) {
1392:       checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details });
1393:       remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: false, details: 'auto-fix failed' });
1394:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1395:     }
1396:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
1397:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: true, details: 'auto-fixed baseline rehydrate' });
1398:   }
1399: 
1400:   const scripts = await detectPackageScriptsInProjectRoot(sandbox, workspaceProjectRoot);
1401:   const shouldBootstrapForValidation =
1402:     autoFixBootstrapToolchain && ((runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) || (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest));
1403:   checks.push({
1404:     code: 'detected_scripts',
1405:     ok: true,
1406:     details: JSON.stringify({ hasBuild: scripts.hasBuild, hasTest: scripts.hasTest }),
1407:   });
1408: 
1409:   const secrets = await detectPotentialSecrets(sandbox);
1410:   if (secrets.length > 0) {
1411:     checks.push({ code: 'secret_scan', ok: false, details: secrets.join(', ') });
1412:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1413:   }
1414:   checks.push({ code: 'secret_scan', ok: true });
1415: 
1416:   let toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile;
1417:   try {
1418:     toolchain = await detectWorkspaceToolchainProfile(
1419:       sandbox,
1420:       workspaceProjectRoot
1421:     );
1422:     checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_detect', ok: true, details: JSON.stringify(toolchain) });
1423:   } catch (error) {
1424:     checks.push({
1425:       code: 'toolchain_detect',
1426:       ok: false,
1427:       details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1428:     });
1429:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1430:   }
1431: 
1432:   if (shouldBootstrapForValidation) {
1433:     try {
1434:       await bootstrapToolchainIfNeeded(sandbox, toolchain);
1435:       checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrap', ok: true });
1436:       remediations.push({
1437:         code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped',
1438:         applied: toolchain.manager === 'pnpm' || toolchain.manager === 'yarn',
1439:       });
1440:     } catch (error) {
1441:       checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrap', ok: false, details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) });
1442:       remediations.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped', applied: false });
1443:       return { ok: false, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1444:     }
1445:   } else {
1446:     checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrap', ok: true, details: 'skipped' });
1447:   }
1448: 
1449:   if ((runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) || (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest)) {
1450:     const manager = managerBinary(toolchain);
1451:     const managerCheck = await sandbox.exec(`command -v ${manager} >/dev/null 2>&1`);
1452:     if (managerCheck.exitCode !== 0) {
1453:       checks.push({
1454:         code: 'validation_tooling',
1455:         ok: false,
1456:         details: `${manager} is not available in sandbox runtime`,
1457:       });
1458:       return { ok: false, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1459:     }
1460:   }
1461:   checks.push({ code: 'validation_tooling', ok: true });
1462: 
1463:   return { ok: true, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1464: }
1465: 
1466: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
1467:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1468:   if (!claimed) {
1469:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1470:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
1471:       try {
1472:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1473:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1474:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1475:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1476:         }
1477:       }
1478:       return;
1479:     }
1480: 
1481:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1482:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1483:       return;
1484:     }
1485: 
1486:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1487:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
1488:         if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1489:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_stale');
1490:           return;
1491:         }
1492:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1493:           workspaceId,
1494:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1495:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1496:         });
1497:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1498:           workspaceId,
1499:           deploymentId,
1500:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1501:           payload: {
1502:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1503:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1504:           },
1505:         });
1506:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1507:           deploymentId,
1508:           status: 'failed',
1509:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1510:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1511:         });
1512:         return;
1513:       }
1514: 
1515:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1516:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1517:       }
1518: 
1519:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
1520:     }
1521:     return;
1522:   }
1523: 
1524:   try {
1525:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
1526:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
1527:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1528:         workspaceId,
1529:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1530:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1531:       });
1532:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1533:         workspaceId,
1534:         deploymentId,
1535:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1536:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
1537:       });
1538:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1539:         deploymentId,
1540:         status: 'failed',
1541:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1542:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1543:       });
1544:       return;
1545:     }
1546: 
1547:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1548:   } catch (error) {
1549:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1550:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
1551:       try {

1553:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1554:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1555:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1556:         }
1557:       }
1558:       return;
1559:     }
1560: 
1561:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {

1566:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {

1570:       );

1572: 
1573:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {

1575:         errorCode: error.code,

1578:       });

1584:       });
1585:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1586:         deploymentId,
1587:         status: 'failed',
1588:         errorCode: error.code,
1589:         errorMessage: error.message,
1590:       });
1591:       return;
1592:     }
1593: 
1594:     const attemptCount = deployment?.attemptCount ?? 0;
1595:     const maxRetries = deployment?.maxRetries ?? 0;
1596:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {

1598:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {

state.title: packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.test.ts

parts.text: **Reviewing deployment status update logic for cancelRequestedAt**

No blocking issues found.

I verified the cancel-rejected success path now clears `cancel_requested_at` correctly:

- In `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1274`, the fallback success branch calls `updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(..., 'succeeded', { cancelRequestedAt: null, ... })` when provider status is still `succeeded` and cancellation was rejected.
- In `packages/worker/src/lib/db.ts:2182`, `updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus` now supports `cancelRequestedAt` and maps it to `cancel_requested_at = ?`, so passing `null` actually clears the DB column.
- The regression test in `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.test.ts:948` asserts status becomes `succeeded`, `cancelRequestedAt` becomes `null`, and `deployment_cancel_rejected` is emitted.
